name: mozi
description: NPU operator workflow plugin for PRD generation, PRD review, SPEC generation, and SPEC review.

interface.shortDescription: Generate PRDs, review readiness, and create SPECs for NPU operator work.
interface.longDescription: Mozi is an end-to-end NPU operator development harness packaged for agent CLIs. The current workflows provide $mozi:create-prd to generate a normalized operator PRD from a brief user prompt or revise an existing PRD from review feedback, $mozi:review-prd to score a PRD for SPEC readiness, $mozi:create-spec to generate or revise a behavioral operator SPEC from a PRD, and $mozi:review-spec to score SPEC quality as YAML.
defaultPrompt: Use $mozi:create-prd to generate a PRD for AddRelu.
Use $mozi:create-prd with a PRD path and review feedback to revise the PRD in place.
Use $mozi:review-prd with a PRD path to score whether the PRD is ready for SPEC.
Use $mozi:create-spec with a PRD path to generate a behavioral operator SPEC.
Use $mozi:create-spec with PRD and SPEC paths plus review feedback to revise the SPEC in place.
Use $mozi:review-spec with an absolute SPEC path to score SPEC quality.
Create a normalized operator PRD from a brief prompt.
Update an operator PRD from review comments.
Prepare a structured PRD document for a new NPU operator.
Review an operator PRD and return a YAML SPEC readiness decision.
Create a structured operator SPEC from an approved or readable PRD.
Review an operator SPEC and return a YAML quality report.
